curation_notes: Pre-assigned as buffer-overflow from CWE-119, but the patch fixes an RSA-PSS signature malleability issue in a JavaScript BigInteger-based library with no memory buffers involved. The fix replaces a post-BigInteger-conversion bit-length check with a pre-conversion hex string length check, preventing acceptance of signatures with prepended zeros. Reclassified to crypto-weakness. Primary location derived from the patch diff: src/rsasign-1.2.js verifyWithMessageHashPSS. No sibling files share the same vulnerability pattern — DSA and ECDSA implementations use different verification flows.
